prompt:
Create a NEW Muha Meds 'How to Enter' giveaway poster, FRESH render (do not edit reference 1 — use it only for layout reference). Aspect ratio 2:3 vertical / 2048×3072. Aesthetic: EXACT cinematic red/gold/cream/black palette of REFERENCE 2 (5-day countdown poster) — wet-Miami-pavement-at-night, warm amber/red atmospheric glow, deep blacks, gold star/border accents, condensed cream serif lettering, gold cursive script for accents. NO Vice-City synthwave pink/teal neons.

Layout (based on REFERENCE 1 brief):
- Top-left: the Muha 'M' gold logo from REFERENCE 3 (use as-is, gold metallic).
- Top: 'HOW TO ENTER THE MUHA MEMBERS' cream subhead.
- Hero headline: 'GIVEAWAY' in big bold cream condensed serif. 'Vice City' in gold flowing cursive script underneath.
- Three numbered steps in a HORIZONTAL ROW across the upper-middle: gold 1 / 2 / 3 numerals with cream all-caps labels '1 GO TO MORE AND TAP "RAFFLES"' / '2 SELECT "GTA RAFFLE"' / '3 TAP "SCAN PRODUCT CODE"', each step paired with a realistic black-bezel iPhone mockup. The iPhone screens MUST display, in order, REFERENCE 4 (raffles screen), REFERENCE 5 ($25,000 raffle detail), REFERENCE 6 (scan product code screen) — render them faithfully.
- Below the phones: large hero red Dodge Challenger SRT EXACTLY matching the car in REFERENCE 2 (same body shape, same headlamp/grille treatment, same wet-asphalt reflections, same camera angle and stance).
- Bottom-LEFT: a deliberate 'SCAN CARD' UI element. Specs — square card ~600×600 px, clean PURE WHITE interior, thin warm gold L-shaped CORNER BRACKETS at all 4 corners (NOT a continuous border, just L-marks at each corner), a small gold rectangular 'SCAN' tag pinned to the upper-left corner with cream serif lettering, a faint warm red/amber outer glow behind the card matching the scene's atmosphere, a soft warm drop shadow grounding it on the wet pavement. CRITICAL: the INTERIOR of the white card must remain PURE solid white — DO NOT render any QR code, modules, dots, pattern, text or marks inside. Pristine empty white surface only.
- To the right of the scan card: gold cursive 'Scan to Find Out!' callout with a curved gold arrow pointing to the scan card.
- Bottom right corner: small palm tree silhouette accent.
- Bottom strip: small cream disclaimer 'Only eligible QR codes will automatically enter you into the GTA Raffle. Not every product has a GTA Raffle QR code.'

Ultra-sharp render, crisp typography, no watermarks, no extra text or marks beyond what is specified. Card interior MUST stay pure white.
